entities.name: RUBBER
entities.description: A tree crop used in intercropping systems and a predominant farming activity in Western Ghana

entities.name: PLANTAIN
entities.description: A crop used in intercropping systems with rubber

entities.name: ELLEMBELLE
entities.description: A district in the Western region of Ghana where field experiments were conducted

entities.name: JOMORO
entities.description: A district in the Western region of Ghana where field experiments were conducted

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used for the study with 3 replications

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing rubber and plantain together in various planting densities

entities.name: SOIL HYDRAULIC PROPERTIES
entities.description: Characteristics of the soil related to the movement and storage of water

entities.name: CUMULATIVE INFILTRATION RATE
entities.description: A specific measure of soil hydraulic properties used to assess water entry into the soil

entities.name: MICROBIAL BIOMASS C
entities.description: The amount of carbon associated with the microbial biomass in the soil

entities.name: MICROBIAL BIOMASS N
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen associated with the microbial biomass in the soil

entities.name: MICROBIAL BIOMASS P
entities.description: The amount of phosphorus associated with the microbial biomass in the soil

entities.name: PLANTING DENSITY
entities.description: The arrangement and number of plantain rows relative to rubber rows

entities.name: AGROFORESTRY
entities.description: The integration of trees and crops, specifically rubber and plantain in this study
